title: Bare Bones x The Winter Drop
description: A resource pack for the The Winter Drop!
body:
im not updating this anymore since the actual bare bone pack is probably going to update to the garden awakens drop once that update releases

hi, this is a resource pack for the winter drop that makes it compatible with the bare bones resource pack!

Credits:

RobotPants for the original Bare Bones Texture Pack and the armor textures.

Required:

Bare Bones by RobotPants: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)
